name: 2021 Games Event 12

movements.notes: starting weight; athlete's own progressive attempts thereafter, 20 seconds per lift (30 seconds in the final single-platform round)

description: A one-rep-max snatch test with fast-paced progressive attempts, the final round contested on a single shared platform.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2021/12 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; tiebreak (for athletes who fail their opening lift) was 3 squat snatches for time at 225 lb (men) / 145 lb (women)
